**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Jiateng Science Development Co., Ltd. exhibits the classic hallmarks of a completely defunct or dormant legacy foreign-invested entity. Erroneously tagged as a 'Medium' sized computer manufacturer due to its historical 1.54 million USD paid-in capital, the reality is starkly different: the company reported 0 insured employees in 2024. Furthermore, its registered address is deep within an older residential/mixed-use alleyway ('No. 148 Weituo Alley, Xiaolingwei'), rendering any form of 'computer and electronic component manufacturing' physically impossible under modern zoning. Established in 1994 during the early wave of HK/Macao/Taiwan IT investments, this entity has long ceased its physical operations. It now exists strictly as a paper shell, retaining its historical capital status but lacking any physical workforce, manufacturing capability, or active commercial presence.
